---
title: "Theming"
description: "An English-only page - shown in every language's nav, linked here with an EN tag until it is translated."
weight: 30
---

This page exists only in English. Because the theme builds navigation from the
primary language and falls back to it for untranslated pages, it still appears in
the Ukrainian sidebar - tagged `EN` and linking here - so nothing is hidden from a
reader browsing in another language.

## Tokens

Colors, spacing and typography are CSS custom properties in
`assets/css/tokens.css`, with a light-theme override block. Change the brand ramp
there to re-skin the theme.
